name: Wife Swap: The Real Housewives Edition
original_name: Wife Swap: The Real Housewives Edition
overview: When a “Real Housewife” takes off her stilettos and steps into a real housewife’s shoes, all bets are off as two of entertainment’s most iconic franchises are mashed up leading to laugh-out-loud moments, personal epiphanies and an opportunity to see if the grass is truly greener.

trailers.title: SNEAK PEEK: Your First Look At Wife Swap: The Real Housewives Edition | (S1) | Bravo
